1. Record the variables you are using in the scenario in cell "A9" for your future reference.
2. Ensure those variables are in the spreadsheet tabs (Rent Roll, Valuation, and Returns)
3. Once you've analyzed a scenario, copy row 9 cells and "paste special - by values" into an empty row in the table to store the results.
Variables to Assess: rent, purchase price, vacancy %, interest rate, estimated appreciation, GST rebate included
Example: "5% Interest. 1% vacancy. Mid-range Market rents ($1625/$2200), 3% appreciation. Purchase price of $1.44M. No GST Rebate."
This sheet calculates your mortgage for your income statement
